case_title: LEIGH DICKEY VS. TYLER JACOB GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DICKEY, LEIGH AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, TYLER JACOB DOES 1 TO 20, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-04-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-19-2012
FEE FOR STIP AND ORDER TO CONT JURIS OF ARB FILED BY DEFENDANT GEORGE, TYLER
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (CHANGE OF ATTORNEY WITHIN SAME FIRM): STEVENS, STACEY M. SUBSTITUTED FOR MIHAESCU, GUNTER AS ATTORNEY FOR DICKEY, LEIGH
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-04-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN SKINNER WARNLOF.
ARBITRATOR MICHAEL ELLIS FREEDMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-28-2012 THROUGH DEC-27-2012.

AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (CHANGE OF ATTORNEY WITHIN SAME FIRM): MIHAESCU, GUNTER SUBSTITUTED FOR BOEGER, CRAIG M AS ATTORNEY FOR DICKEY, LEIGH
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-27-2012.
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO CONTINUE JURISDICTION OF ARBITRATOR TO JAN-24-2013

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-07-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-22-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR FREEDMAN, MICHAEL ELLIS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DICKEY, LEIGH SERVED FEB-10-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGE, TYLER JACOB
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO JAN-24-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE REMOVED FROM PENDING TRIAL DE NOVO CALENDAR - UNTIMELY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT GEORGE, TYLER
